title: Grouped tabs
excerpt: My feature request today is to ask for the ability to group up tabs - like you can do it on web browsers these days. If you have lots of tabs, it will save scrolling horizontally too

posts.author: Deafzone (Tony Barlow)
posts.cookedHtml: My feature request today is to ask for the ability to group up tabs - like you can do it on web browsers these days. If you have lots of tabs, it will save scrolling horizontally too
